name: H-13 artifact declares all required §2.27 fields (parent_session_id, parent_cl_id, current_phase, context_summary, next_action)
command: H13_ARTIFACT_DIR=art bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/agent-continuity.sh" --write --session-id cl-302 --parent-session-id cl-301 --parent-cl-id cl-301 --current-phase E --context-summary 'mid' --next-action 'go' --next-rationale 'because' --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z 2>/dev/null && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("art/cl-302.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.parent_session_id==="cl-301"&&j.parent_cl_id==="cl-301"&&j.current_phase==="E"&&j.context_summary==="mid"&&j.next_action.action==="go"&&j.next_action.rationale==="because"?0:1)' && echo schema 1>&2
